exploration_notes: Investigation traces the full eBPF fault isolation architecture in Cilium. The chain follows policy distribution from K8s API watchers (pkg/policy/k8s/watcher.go) through the policy importer (pkg/policy/cell/policy_importer.go) to per-endpoint regeneration (pkg/endpoint/policy.go, bpf.go), and finally to per-node BPF compilation and loading (pkg/datapath/loader/). Maps are node-local kernel objects pinned to /sys/fs/bpf/ (pkg/bpf/bpffs_linux.go), with per-endpoint naming via LocalMapName(). The
